## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and contains no unrelated generated files.
- [ ] Tests or manual validation cover the changed behavior.
- [ ] User-facing changes are documented in both READMEs where applicable.
- [ ] No signing material, credentials, device identifiers, or private logs are included.
- [ ] Third-party attribution and licenses remain intact.
